caption: The video appears to be shot from a first-person perspective, likely using a head-mounted or handheld camera. The scene is set outdoors at night, with a dimly lit environment that suggests it might be raining or has recently rained, as the ground looks wet and reflective. The camera is positioned near a doorway, looking out onto a dark yard or garden area. In the foreground, there is a white vase with some greenery, possibly a plant, placed on a surface next to the door. The camera remains relatively still throughout the sequence, capturing the quiet and somewhat eerie atmosphere of the nighttime setting. There are no visible characters or significant movements, emphasizing the stillness and solitude of the moment.
